name: Country Breakfast Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Pork sausage, browned and drained
1 cup Southern-style frozen hash-brown potatoes, thawed
1/4 cup Chopped red or green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place the crust on a baking sheet.
3. Scatter the sausage around the bottom of the crust.
4. Top with potatoes, onions, bell peppers, and cheese.
5. Beat eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until blended.
6. Pour the mixture over the sausage-potato combination in the crust.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until the egg mixture is cooked and the crust is lightly browned.
8. Sprinkle with additional cheese and peppers, if desired.
Makes 6 servings.
Per serving: Calories 553 Fat 39g Cholesterol 231 mg Sodium 1040 mg Percent calories from fat 64%
